title: vandellia vogelii
intro: Vandellia vogelii, also known as "stick insect plant" or "snake grass," is a climbing vine native to Africa, belonging to the family Loranthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vandellia vogelii include reducing swelling and pain, and aiding in the recovery from infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for oral consumption, or applied topically as a poultice to treat various health conditions.
